data.title: Predicted DOGE price to reach $0.11-$0.15 by April 2026. Short-term goal $0.10-$0.105. Bullish breakout at $0.15.
data.description: Forecast for the price of DOGE suggests a short-term target of $0.10 to $0.105 within 1 week and a medium-term forecast in the range of $0.11 to $0.15 over the next month. A bullish breakout level is identified at $0.15, while critical support levels were not specified.

data.title: Cardano's ADA at $0.26, RSI 46.16 hints at $0.29 breakout. Technical analysis predicts $0.25 support retest soon.
data.description: The cryptocurrency ADA is currently trading at $0.26 with a neutral Relative Strength Index (RSI) at 46.16. According to technical analysis, there is a possible movement towards the resistance level of $0.29 or a retest of the support level at $0.25 in the upcoming weeks.

data.title: XRP currently trades at $1.38, eyeing $1.46 resistance level with RSI at 44.39. Indicators hint at consolidation phase ahead.
data.description: The cryptocurrency XRP is currently trading at $1.38, with a neutral Relative Strength Index (RSI) at 44.39. Analysts are eyeing a target of $1.46, which represents a resistance level. Technical indicators are pointing towards a consolidation phase in the near future, signaling a possible breakout or breakdown.

data.title: BNB price eyes $659 breakout, trading at $634.30 with RSI suggesting consolidation. Support seen at $628, resistance at $621.
data.description: The cryptocurrency BNB is currently being traded at $634.30, showing signs of potential consolidation as per the neutral RSI. In the volatile crypto market, bulls are aiming for a resistance level of $659, while bears are watching the support level at $621.

data.title: By April 2026, ETH may hit $2,230 resistance, currently trading at $2,119 with RSI of 49.89. Bitcoin Suisse predicts $7,000-$9,000 for 2026.
data.description: The current trading price of Ethereum (ETH) stands at $2,119, showing a neutral momentum as its Relative Strength Index (RSI) hovers around 49.89. Technical analysis indicates a potential breakout to reach $2,230. In addition, Bitcoin Suisse has set cycle targets for 2026 in the range of $7,000 to $9,000 for ETH.

data.title: Bitcoin's price at $69,968 dropped by 1.58%, eyes resistance at $72,787. Possible rise to $75,000-$78,000.
data.description: Bitcoin is currently priced at $69,968 following a 1.58% decrease, and is approaching a crucial resistance level at $72,787. Analysts predict that if market sentiment turns positive in the near future, Bitcoin could rally to somewhere between $75,000 and $78,000.

data.title: DOT price may hit $1.50-1.70 by April 2026, showing oversold signs at $1.33 with RSI at 37.58, implying a rebound.
data.description: The cryptocurrency Polkadot (DOT) is currently trading at $1.33, displaying oversold signals with the Relative Strength Index (RSI) at 37.58. Analysts forecast a potential recovery target between $1.50 and $1.70 by April 2026 based on technical indicators, indicating a bounce from the current support levels.

data.title: Stelia and Nokia collaborate to advance AI for enterprise
data.description: In London, Stelia AI revealed a partnership with Nokia to enhance the implementation of high-performance, trustworthy AI on a large scale within enterprises. Stelia operates in data-rich enterprise settings globally, supporting governed, high-quality AI operations. Through incorporating Nokia's top-notch open-standards networking tech into its AI framework, Stelia assures consistent performance across expansive systems, tailored for enterprise use.

data.title: Verne, Pony.ai, and Uber Partner to Launch Europe's First Commercial Robotaxi Service
data.description: A new partnership is set to launch in Zagreb and will later extend to other European cities and beyond. The partnership involves Verne and Pony AI Inc. (NASDAQ: PONY; HKEX: 2026), a prominent company specializing in the widespread implementation of autonomous driving technology. Beginning in Zagreb, this initiative marks a significant step towards the global expansion of autonomous driving solutions. Stay tuned for further updates as this venture progresses.

data.title: Cerillion Achieves TM Forum "Diamond-Level" Open API Certification with Industry-Leading Real-World Deployments
data.description: In London on March 26, 2026, Cerillion (AIM: CER), a top supplier of composable BSS/OSS solutions for telecoms, disclosed attaining "Diamond-level" status in TM Forum's Open API Conformance program. This status is given to vendors certifying over a specified number of services.

data.title: Uppsala first in the world with IQ tourism
data.description: In Uppsala, Sweden, a commemorative stone has been erected for an imaginary event, capturing the essence of creativity. Additionally, an artisan perfumery innovatively crafts fragrances akin to compelling narratives. Notably, a cinnamon bun has gained significance as a cultural symbol in the city. These unique features represent novel concepts that have revolutionized our perspectives and are shaping cultural identity. The city's heritage is not only captured in physical artifacts but also in visionary ideas that inspire and challenge conventions, exemplifying the innovative spirit of Uppsala.

data.title: Allergan Aesthetics Reinforces Scientific Differentiation and Leadership with 21 Evidence-Based E-Posters at the 2026 Aesthetic & Anti-Aging Medicine World Congress (AMWC)
data.description: Five scientific electronic posters showcase the investigational neurotoxin TrenibotulinumtoxinE (TrenibotE), indicating rapid enhancement in glabellar lines within 8 hours, consistent and strong effectiveness, and a safe profile among diverse patient groups worldwide.

data.title: The New Language of Gourmand: Hamidi Captivates Cosmoprof Bologna
data.description: In Bologna, Italy on March 26, 2026, Hamidi captivated the audience at Cosmoprof Bologna with a nuanced approach. The spotlight was on indulgence, highlighted by two key fragrances at the event - Fondue Tropical and Fondue Exotic. These scents defined the essence of the showcase, showcasing a blend of elegance and luxury.
BioPorto A/S has called for its Annual General Meeting, details of which to be shared at a later date.

data.title: Clarivate Reveals the AI50 - the Organizations Leading Artificial Intelligence Invention
data.description: On March 26, 2026, Clarivate Plc unveiled the Clarivate AI50, recognizing organizations excelling in high-impact artificial intelligence (AI) with a new data-driven benchmark. Clarivate Plc, listed on NYSE under the ticker symbol CLVT, is a prominent global provider of transformative intelligence. The Clarivate AI50 showcases companies leading in AI innovation, highlighting their exceptional performance in this field.

data.title: DURABOOK Launches Z14I-HG: The World's first AI-ready Fully Rugged Mobile Workstation Delivering AI Performance up to 682 TOPS
data.description: Durabook, a leading rugged mobile solutions brand owned by Twinhead International Corporation, has launched a cutting-edge 14-inch mobile graphics workstation. This powerful device features 16GB of GDDR6 memory, making it ideal for advanced AI, simulation, and data processing tasks. Specifically designed for use in extreme environments, this workstation is equipped to excel in challenging conditions. The product was unveiled in Taipei on March 26, 2026.

data.title: Rockwell Automation Showcases Autonomous Industrial Operations at Hannover Messe 2026
data.description: DUSSELDORF, Germany, March 26, 2026 - The focus on cybersecurity, AI-enabled autonomy, and digital engineering is prominent at the 'AI in Manufacturing' Hall in Dusseldorf. Rockwell Automation, the leading company in industrial automation and digital transformation globally, is at the forefront of these advancements. Today, they are showcasing cutting-edge technologies in these areas.

data.title: A Moment of Indulgence: Risala Captivates with Kefi Latte at Cosmoprof Bologna
data.description: In Bologna, Italy, on March 26, 2026, Risala made a strong impact at Cosmoprof Bologna with a dynamic presence. The booth saw continuous activity, attracting worldwide distributors, key figures, and a fresh wave of fragrance fans. The brand's unique offerings garnered attention at the event.
